habitat: Forests of northern China, Korea, and Russian Far East.
traditionalUsesEn: TCM adaptogenic berry (wu wei zi, five-flavor fruit) for fatigue and resilience traditions.
activeCompounds: Lignans (schisandrin and related), organic acids, essential oil
preparation: Dried berry decoctions, tinctures, modern extracts.
cautions: May interact with drugs via liver enzymes. Professional guidance for therapeutic use.
historicalNotes: Classic Taoist tonic fruit of northern Chinese medicine.
